subject: Art and Design
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Co-ordinate with local art institutions or arrange guest speakers/ artists, if the field trip
activities: Task 1: Critique identified/ readily made artefacts they were exposed to during art gallery
Task 2: Write a critique or create a video presentation sharing analysis of one artwork.
